body.raw:
{
  "trackerType": "pain",
  "name": "Pain",
  "description": "A brief check-in on physical pain and its impact across the past week.",
  "items": [
    { "text": "Physical pain has been part of my days.", "reverse": false },
    { "text": "The pain has reached a level that was hard to bear.", "reverse": false },
    { "text": "The pain has broken into my sleep.", "reverse": false },
    { "text": "The pain has held me back from work or daily tasks.", "reverse": false },
    { "text": "The pain has cost me time with people or things I value.", "reverse": false },
    { "text": "I have had stretches of being at home in my body, free of pain.", "reverse": true },
    { "text": "The pain has dragged my mood down or made me edgy.", "reverse": false },
    { "text": "I have given up activities I would normally do because of the pain.", "reverse": false },
    { "text": "I have leaned on medication or other interventions to get through.", "reverse": false },
    { "text": "The pain has felt unpredictable, slippery, or hard to influence.", "reverse": false }
  ],
  "options": [
    { "value": 0, "label": "Never" },
    { "value": 1, "label": "Rarely" },
    { "value": 2, "label": "Sometimes" },
    { "value": 3, "label": "Often" },
    { "value": 4, "label": "Almost always" }
  ],
  "bands": [
    { "max": 9,  "label": "Minimal",  "description": "Few signs of significant pain or pain-related impact over the past week." },
    { "max": 17, "label": "Mild",     "description": "Some pain present, with mild impact on daily life. Worth tracking but not substantially disrupting day-to-day functioning." },
    { "max": 25, "label": "Moderate", "description": "A meaningful level of pain and pain-related impact over the past week. If you haven't already, please make sure your GP or medical team are aware." },
    { "max": 32, "label": "Marked",   "description": "Substantial pain with likely impact on sleep, mood, and activity. Please make sure your GP or medical team are aware of this level of pain — chronic pain often benefits from a combined medical and psychological approach." },
    { "max": 40, "label": "Severe",   "description": "A high level of pain with significant impact across multiple areas of life. Please make sure your medical team see this score, and consider whether your current pain management plan needs review." }
  ],
  "alerts": [],
  "stemKey": null
}
